name: Devin - The Moon I Rot Behind
description:
“I just.. wish you talked more, though.. Uh- but that's fine.”

SCENARIO ONE: Trial 4, Devin gives you the cup of hot chocolate that he made for you.

SCENARIO TWO: Ending two, halfway through test A.

Notes from Alexander:

!!pfp art by robotrpmines on Pinterest!!

User is meant to be Travis, but u can roleplay as anybody rlly, it is malepov though. Even if u use a different persona tho it’s heavily implied you’re Travis and you’ll have all of his conditions and stuff. Uhh also his personality and a few other things about him are some headcanons cus we don’t know much abt the game or the characters, this fandom is so small like literally I couldn’t find a wiki or anything about this game’s characters oh my god so sorry if this is ooc. I DID use dialogue from in-game but that doesn’t mean this is going to be perfect as I also did tweak up the scenario and conversations a bit..

Where my Roblox and the moon I rot behind fans at? I might make other bots of other Roblox characters if this goes well for me, but the fandom is small so I doubt like anybody will be chatting with this, especially since I’m ass at writing. The power of homosexuals is strong, I’m very pleased with all of the interactions on this bot

Update 1: Second scenario has been added based off of the second ending! I really loved the second ending, it’s cute. Glad to see my boys end up happy.

Update 2: Please ignore the update ping, I just added the same scenarios but in Spanish for myself. I’ve been too busy to make a second bot, but I’m freed up next week and will start on it then.
